HomePage.title: Start Your Day With Coffee
HomePage.description: Discover our coffees, carefully roasted and brewed from fresh beans.

ProductsPage.title: Our Products
ProductsPage.description: Discover our carefully selected coffee beans and equipment.
ProductsPage.notFound: The product you're looking for could not be found.

AboutPage.title: About Us
AboutPage.description: Since 1998, we've been bringing coffee lovers together through carefully roasted coffee.
AboutPage.paragraph1: MyCoffee began its journey in 1998 in a small roasting workshop, and we continue that same passion today. Our goal is to bring specialty coffee beans, carefully selected from around the world, to your cup at their freshest.
AboutPage.paragraph2: Even as we've grown over the years, our respect for coffee hasn't changed: every batch is hand-picked, every roast is carefully monitored. Today we offer a wide range of products for both filter coffee lovers and espresso enthusiasts.
AboutPage.value1Description: We work only with carefully selected beans from traceable sources.
AboutPage.value2Description: We strive to build long-term, fair relationships with our producer partners.
AboutPage.value3Description: Every roasting batch is prepared with skill earned through years of experience.

ContactPage.title: Contact
ContactPage.description: Reach out to us using the form below for any questions or requests.

ContactForm.nameError: Please enter your name with at least 2 characters.

ContactForm.messageError: Your message must be at least 10 characters.
ContactForm.successMessage: Your message has been sent successfully, thank you!
